archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Modified for eSports/Brazilian Football)
vibe: Stadium Night / eSports Hype / Premium Broadcast

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous (p-6, p-8) for lobbies, tight (p-2, gap-2) for draft player lists and match simulation tables.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid - Pitch Visualizer takes col-span-2 or center stage, available players take narrow tall columns.
layout_and_spacing.general_alignment: Left-align dense text and tables. Center-align main hype elements (Draft turn banners, Champion announcements).

surface_strategies.app_background: Stadium background image with heavy black overlay (bg-black/80) to maintain deep contrast and legibility.
surface_strategies.player_cards: Glassmorphism (bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md) with sharp 1px border. High OVR players get a metallic or neon glow border (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,215,0,0.5)]).
surface_strategies.pitch_visualizer: Solid deep green background with crisp semi-transparent neon lines. Player slots are distinct drop zones with dashed borders until filled.

components_strategy.Lobby: Dark neon sports betting/FUT vibe. Large room code. Toggle switches (Shadcn customized) for OVR visibility. Formation selector using toggle groups.
components_strategy.PitchVisualizer: Vertical orientation CSS layout. Lines drawn using div borders or SVGs. Formations (4-3-3, 4-4-2, etc.) dynamically update absolute positioning or CSS grid slots.
components_strategy.DraftCard: FUT-style. Top left OVR, Club Logo in background, Player Name at bottom. Position label colored by area (ATT=Blue, MID=Green, DEF=Yellow).
components_strategy.MatchSimulation: List of active matches with 'live' pulsing red dots. Scores in Oswald. Goals trigger a momentary invert/flash animation of the match row.
components_strategy.StandingsTable: Dense. border-collapse. Row styling: left border colored by zone (Libertadores/Relegation). Current user's team row highlighted with a subtle bg-white/10.

animations.DraftPick: Framer Motion 3D card flip on selection. 'It is your turn' banner slides down with aggressive ease-out.
animations.GoalFlash: Keyframe animation: bg-white/20 flash + text scale up + drop-shadow glow.
animations.SpeedSelector: Smooth transition between Slow/Fast/Turbo states. Turbo adds a slight chromatic aberration or speed line effect if possible, or just accelerates standard ticking.

icons_and_assets.rules: Icons should be bold/duotone to match the gaming aesthetic.

testing.required_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='draft-player-card', data-testid='start-sim-button').

backgrounds.description: Night soccer stadium with dark lights. Use with bg-black/80 overlay.
backgrounds.usage: Main app background, fixed and covers viewport.
Use as fallback or for final champion screen background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure FastAPI + MongoDB + WebSockets are used for backend.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for game screens (Pitch, Draft) where Shadcn might be too rigid. Use Shadcn for lobbies, dialogs, forms, toggles.
Implement the pitch visualizer using a parent relative container and absolute positioned player slots based on the chosen formation coordinates.
Ensure the match engine runs sequentially up to 38 rounds, emitting websocket events for goals and time progression.
Font loading: Import Anton, Oswald, and Outfit from Google Fonts in the main index.html or CSS.
Add tailwind rules for data-testid targeting if needed, but primarily use them for test hooks.
